marketplace.title: Grid Bots
marketplace.subtitle: Template catalog and launch flow for futures grid execution.
marketplace.dashboardSubtitle: MasterVault plus active grid runs in a split dashboard.
marketplace.createSubtitle: Create a new grid run from a published template.
marketplace.createHeroHint: Choose a published grid template, review the deterministic preview, and start the bot immediately.
marketplace.previewOnlyHint: Preview only. Nothing is saved or executed.
marketplace.catalogSubtitle: Search, filter, favorite, inspect, and launch published grid templates.
marketplace.catalogEmptyBody: Try another search or reset the current filters.
marketplace.runningSubtitle: Select an active grid run on the left to inspect and manage it on the right.
marketplace.selectInstanceHint: Select a grid run from the list to open the detailed view.
marketplace.noExecutionAccountsTitle: No eligible grid execution account found
marketplace.noExecutionAccountsBody: Grid bots currently require a paper execution account. To make one available, first add a market-data account and then create a linked paper account.
marketplace.noExecutionAccountsHint: Currently allowed grid exchanges: {exchanges}. As soon as the paper account is configured, it will appear here.
marketplace.launchSetupManualHint: Set budget, margin and trigger inputs before launching the template.
marketplace.launchSetupAutoHint: Auto margin uses the total budget directly. The runtime allocates reserve capital for safety.
marketplace.allocationLine: Allocation mode: {allocationMode} · budget split policy: {budgetSplitPolicy} · long/short budget: {longPct}% / {shortPct}% · margin policy: {marginPolicy}
marketplace.autoPolicyInactive: Manual mode active: auto reserve policy is inactive during creation.
marketplace.policyLiqGuardSuffix: (max grid while respecting liq distance + min investment)
marketplace.previewSectionHint: We only enable launch when the latest preview is valid and within the current guardrails.
marketplace.previewRuntimeAuthError: Grid runtime authorization failed. Check that API and Python service use the same grid/strategy auth token.
marketplace.templateBounds: Template bounds: fixed leverage {leverage}x. Auto reserve policy {policy} (target liq {targetLiq}%, max iterations {iterations}). Final minimum investment is venue-aware and checked again on start.
marketplace.templateBoundsSimple: Template bounds: fixed leverage {leverage}x. Final minimum investment is venue-aware and checked again on start.
marketplace.vaultLine: vault net {realizedNet} USDT · fee accrued {feeAccrued} USDT · withdrawable {withdrawable} USDT
marketplace.demoVaultOverviewHint: Internal offchain/shadow projection for the demo vault in the current admin mode.
marketplace.masterVaultBalanceHint: Current MasterVault balance overview for grid allocation.
marketplace.masterVaultOverviewOnchainHint: Overview for the same MasterVault. Wallet-signed onchain actions are shown directly in the block below.
marketplace.demoVaultHint: This is the demo/shadow vault. Deposits and withdrawals stay internal and offchain in this mode.
marketplace.masterVaultInvalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount greater than 0.
marketplace.masterVaultWithdrawInsufficient: Insufficient free balance for this withdraw request.
marketplace.masterVaultOnchainActionsHint: For this already connected onchain MasterVault, deposits and withdrawals are executed only through the wallet-signed onchain actions in the next block.
marketplace.initialSeedLine: Initial seed: side {side} · qty {qty} · notional {notional} USDT · margin {margin} USDT ({pct}%)
marketplace.pilotRequired: HyperVaults grid preview and creation currently require rollout access.
marketplace.workspaceAccessDenied: This published template is currently not usable for your workspace. Please reload or contact support if the issue persists.
marketplace.workspaceNotFound: No workspace was found for your user. Please contact support or an admin.

instance.title: Grid Bot Dashboard
instance.confirmEnd: Really end bot "{name}" ({symbol})? Open orders will be cancelled, positions closed, and the bot archived.
instance.archivedBanner: This bot is archived ({reason}) since {at}. It cannot be restarted.
instance.riskWarning: Risk warning: liquidation distance is below threshold ({actual}% < {min}%). New entry intents are blocked.
instance.windowLine: Order window: open {openOrders} / target {targetOrders} · buys {buys} · sells {sells} · recenter {recenterReason}
instance.seedLine: Initial seed: side {side} · qty {qty} · notional {notional} USDT · margin {margin} USDT
instance.autoPolicyLine: Auto margin policy: trigger {trigger} @ {triggerValue} · step {step} USDT · cooldown {cooldown}s · cap {cap} USDT
instance.openOrdersAdminHint: Technical order list for admin diagnostics.
instance.providerSyncLine: Execution unit {executionUnitId} · last action {lastAction} · last synced {lastSynced}

onchain.masterCreateHint: Create the onchain MasterVault here if it does not exist yet. Deposits and withdrawals are managed from the Wallet page.
onchain.walletLinkRequired: Link a wallet in settings before using onchain vault actions.
onchain.walletConnectRequired: Connect the linked wallet before sending onchain actions.
onchain.walletMismatch: The connected wallet does not match the linked owner wallet ({wallet}).
onchain.modeDisabled: Current execution mode is offchain_shadow. Onchain actions are disabled until simulated or live mode is active.
onchain.claimHint: Use this to release realized funds back to the MasterVault without closing the BotVault.
onchain.closeHint: Use this when the BotVault is ready to settle principal and remaining free funds back to the MasterVault.
onchain.previewLegacyHint: Legacy vault detected. This vault keeps the older settlement path without automatic onchain treasury payout.

messages.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount greater than 0.
messages.insufficientUsdc: Insufficient USDC balance for this deposit.
messages.insufficientGas: Insufficient HYPE balance for gas on HyperEVM.
messages.waitingApproval: Approval submitted. Waiting for wallet confirmation.
messages.approvalConfirmed: USDC approval confirmed. You can now submit the deposit.
messages.approvalRejected: USDC approval was rejected in the wallet.
messages.depositRejected: Deposit was rejected in the wallet.
messages.closeOnlyRequired: This BotVault must first be switched to onchain close-only before it can be closed.
messages.txSubmitted: Transaction submitted. Waiting for wallet confirmations and chain indexing.
messages.walletConfirmedIndexerPending: Wallet transaction confirmed. Waiting for onchain indexer and projections to catch up.
